label: Athanor System Constitution
principles: Athanor is the sole governor of runtime command, routing, task creation, lease issuance, and degraded-mode selection.
Cloud capability is optional and policy-gated; sovereignty is non-negotiable for critical work.
Protected workloads must always retain a viable local path even when frontier lanes are stronger.
Every meaningful run must be explainable in terms of who decided, which lane executed, which policy applied, and what judge scored it.
no_go_rules: Do not send sovereign_only or refusal_sensitive raw content to cloud lanes.
Do not allow meta lanes to directly mutate runtime, spend premium capacity, or bypass approval policy.
Do not let workers or judges gain command rights, schedule ownership, or approval authority.
Do not auto-execute destructive, security-sensitive, or irreversible actions outside policy-approved bands.
